name: export-compliance-check
description: Verifies export eligibility based on destination country restrictions, product classification, and sanctions lists.
long_description: This circuit performs export compliance verification by checking product classifications against CCL (Commerce Control List) items, verifying destination country restrictions, and checking against OFAC sanctions lists. It produces a cryptographic proof that an export decision was made according to applicable regulations.

private.name: hs_code
private.description: 10-digit Harmonized System code for the product

private.name: item_description
private.description: Detailed text description of the item being exported

public.name: destination_country
public.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of destination

public.name: end_use
public.description: Intended end use: commercial, government, military, or scientific

public.name: compliant
public.description: Whether the export is compliant with regulations

public.name: restriction_codes
public.description: Array of applicable export restriction codes (e.g., EAR, ITAR, OFAC)

public.name: license_required
public.description: Whether an export license is required

dataset_dependencies.description: Bureau of Industry and Security Commerce Control List
Office of Foreign Assets Control Specially Designated Nationals list

author: VRL Trade Working Group
security_notes: Does not make final export authorization decisions. Circuits must be validated against current CCL and OFAC lists before use. Dataset dependencies are critical.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 6. Proof generation time: ~80ms. Proof size: ~2KB.

changelog.changes: Initial release with CCL and OFAC list checking
